description: Recipe of some kind, very faded. Legible phrases include "al-zūfā wa-l-sunbul"—the hyssop and the spikenard (? Would depend on the next word, now missing); "lubb fustuq"—pistachio kernel; "yusḥaq wa-yunkhal wa-yuʿjan"—crush it and strain it and knead it; "wa-yuʿjan thāniyatan"—knead it again; "ṣamgh ʿarabī"—gum arabic. ASE.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
